strategies.name: HALLUCINATE_ROUNDS_THEN_VALIDATE
strategies.desc: Run N rounds of agent work, validate only at terminal gate. Higher throughput, higher risk of late-stage rework.

strategies.name: VALIDATE_AS_YOU_GO
strategies.desc: Validate after every batch. Lowest risk, highest overhead.

strategies.name: HYBRID
strategies.desc: Validate at phase boundaries. Balanced risk and throughput.
